ksa_text: Knowledge of reference data management principles, including reference data taxonomy design, governance of controlled vocabularies, change management for reference data updates, and maintaining consistency across reference datasets.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of collection systems, capabilities, and processes.

nice.top_element_label: Identify the types of information to be processed, stored, or transmitted by a system

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-010 (Data Quality) scores 0.426 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Observability Engineer: in_scope. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. In-scope domain, score 0.426. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality KSA DQ-K-010 as a discrete competency for Data Observability Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality is primary for Data Observability Engineer. Score 0.426. Market evidence strongly supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld. Data Quality is core for Data Observability Engineer. Market evidence supports inclusion.

decision_rationale: Data Quality (primary) for Data Observability Engineer. Score 0.426. Market evidence supports inclusion as a discrete competency.
